message:
fix: update tests for useCachedData and useTopology after PR #8743 Zod validation (#8753)

Security issue test mocks were missing the required `namespace` field
that the new SecurityIssuesResponseSchema (added in PR #8743) enforces
via Zod validation. The useTopology network-error test had a race
condition where isDemoData was initially true before the fetch ran,
causing the waitFor to resolve immediately before demo graph data was
set — fixed by waiting for graph to be non-null instead.

Fixes #8749

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
